title: PIL in Delhi HC seeks contempt action against Arvind Kejriwal for publishing videos of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma's court
description: A plea has been filed before the Delhi High Court seeking contempt of court action against Arvind Kejriwal, several leaders of the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) and journalist Ravish Kumar for publishing videos of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma's court proceedings in the excise policy case.The petition by advocate Vaibhav Singh has taken objection to video recordings of court proceedings wherein Kejriwal argued his plea seeking recusal of Justice Sharma.The videos were published on social media.Apart from
